---
title: ""
subtitle: "<br/><br/><br/><br/><br/><br/>"
format: html
toc: true
title-block-banner: "images/background-pic.jpg"
---

:::{#hero-heading}

## Education

**Leiden University** | Leiden, Netherlands  
MSc in Applied Neuroscience in Human Development | 2018 - 2020  
- Thesis: *Prenatal Exposure to Maternal Distress, Brain Structure, and ADHD Traits in Preadolescents: An Exploratory Study* (Grade: 8.5/10)

**Leiden University** | Leiden, Netherlands  
Premaster in Education and Child Studies | 2016 - 2017  
- Thesis: *Comprehension and Memory for Text: The Effect of Aging on Recognition Performance* (Grade: 8.5/10)

**Leiden University** | Leiden, Netherlands  
BSc in Bio-Pharmaceutical Sciences | 2009 - 2016  
- Minor: Science & Research-Based Business  
- Thesis: *The Maturation of Acetaminophen Metabolism in Zebrafish (Danio rerio) Larvae as a Model System*



## Experience

**Erasmus School of Social and Behavioural Sciences (ESSB)** | Rotterdam, Netherlands  
Research Assistant | Dec 2021 – Present  
- Developed and managed datasets from international child surveys for an Erasmus+ project.  
- Performed statistical analyses and data visualizations for publications and conferences.  
- Created detailed R-Markdown documentation for reproducible workflows.

**Erasmus MC Sophia Children's Hospital** | Rotterdam, Netherlands  
Research Intern | Sep 2019 – Aug 2020  
- Evaluated the quality of MRI data and conducted statistical analyses for research studies.  
- Contributed to research manuscripts and reporting.

**Leiden Academic Centre for Drug Research (LACDR)** | Leiden, Netherlands  
Research Intern | Mar 2016 – Jul 2016  
- Investigated the pharmacokinetic profile of paracetamol in zebrafish larvae.  
- Designed experiments, analyzed data, and presented findings.

---

## Publications

- Dijkstra, K., El Ghani, A., Peiris Millaniya, K. U., & Van der Hallen, R. (2024). Veerkracht bij jeugd door voetbal. *De Psycholoog*, 10-19.  
- Dijkstra, K., & El Ghani, A. (2024). Rotterdam Goud: Eindrapport Pilot Rotterdams Goud: Wijzen van leren en sociaal-emotioneel welbevinden.  
- Millaniya, K. P., Smit, I., & Dijkstra, K. (2022). FAIR-play Handbook: Implementation of academic concepts into football practices. *Erasmus Initiative Vital Cities and Citizens, Erasmus+*.

:::
